summary: Complete theme switching testing across ALL pages of GoSocial app. Theme toggle functionality works correctly - dark/light mode switches properly with localStorage persistence. All major pages tested in both modes show proper contrast and readability.

design_issues.screen: Landing page mockups (LeadScoringMockup, AICopilotMockup, CRMInboxMockup, etc.)
issues: Hardcoded slate-* colors in decorative mockups - these are intentional as they're demo screenshots showing the dark-themed app interface

passed_tests: - Theme toggle button visible in header (sun/moon icon)
- Theme class applied to HTML element correctly
- Hero section text visible in both dark/light modes
- Pricing section cards readable in both modes
- Footer text readable in both modes
- CTA sections with gradient text visible in both modes
- Stats cards (Total Leads, Qualified, Conversations, Conversion) readable in both modes
- Sales Pipeline chart labels visible in both modes
- Lead Quality pie chart with legend readable in both modes
- Recent Conversations list readable in both modes
- Table headers visible in both modes
- Lead names, handles, platform badges readable
- Stats cards readable in both modes
- Conversation list readable in both modes
- Template cards visible in both modes
- Stats cards readable in both modes
- WhatsApp/Instagram cards visible in both modes
- Form inputs visible in both modes
critical_code_review_comments: Theme toggle works correctly via ThemeContext.js
CSS variables properly defined in index.css for light/dark themes
All major pages use theme-aware Tailwind classes (text-foreground, bg-card, text-muted-foreground, border-border, etc.)
Landing page mockups intentionally use hardcoded slate colors for consistent demo appearance
Theme toggle button properly placed in header with sun/moon icons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme switching is fully working. All pages tested in dark and light modes with proper contrast and readability. The landing page mockup components (LeadScoringMockup, AICopilotMockup, etc.) use hardcoded slate-* colors intentionally as they are decorative demo screenshots. Previous iteration_7 tested Autopilot and Integrations features (all passed). Theme persisted in localStorage with key 'gosocial-theme'.
